compiled_state.title: RED test: Add fragile score mapping test for overlay resolution
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
UPDATE

## Description
Modify or extend tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh to verify fragile findings:
1. Fragile findings receive score 3 in the severity_to_score mapping
2. Fragile findings are treated as blocking (has_blocking=True) in overlay aggregation

Test approach: Create overlay findings JSON with severity fragile, run resolve-overlay-findings.sh, assert computed score is 3 and finding is blocking.

Tests must FAIL (RED) because resolve-overlay-findings.sh does not include fragile in severity_to_score.

## File Impact
- tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 1 new test for fragile overlay handling
  Verify: grep -c 'fragile' tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 1)}'
- [ ] New fragile test fails RED
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh 2>&1 | grep -q FAIL

comments.body: CHECKPOINT:batch-complete — Done ✓ — Files: tests/hooks/test-overlay-resolution-integration.sh. Tests: 2 RED tests written, confirmed failing.
comments.author: Test
